allow: PowerShell(netsh advfirewall firewall show rule name="Expo Metro" 2>$null)
PowerShell(netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name="Expo Metro 8081" dir=in action=allow protocol=TCP localport=8081)
PowerShell(netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name="Expo Metro 8082" dir=in action=allow protocol=TCP localport=8082)
PowerShell(netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name="Expo DevTools 19000" dir=in action=allow protocol=TCP localport=19000)
PowerShell(netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name="Expo DevTools 19001" dir=in action=allow protocol=TCP localport=19001)
